description: Prescription digital therapeutic for musculoskeletal pain using computer vision AI for exercise coaching. FDA-cleared, available in US, UK, and Germany. Covered by major insurers.
business_model: B2B2C - Sold to insurers and employers who offer to members/employees
target_market: US, UK, Germany - health insurers, employers, and healthcare systems
competitive_advantage: FDA clearance, clinical evidence, computer vision technology, payer partnerships

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary to occupational health - MSK is major cause of sick leave
